locations.title: Hidden Package #6
locations.description:
Briefcase worth $16500 located near rear of the plane on the ocean floor.


**Bug:** Recently, hidden packages haven't been appearing properly. If you don't see it, quick save and re-load the game and it will be there.

**Tip**: Best way to collect packages is with the Nagasaki Dinghy, which has scuba equipment. Simply search for "Dinghy" using the search feature.

locations.title: Hidden Package #10
locations.description:
Hidden Package Briefcase $9000 on top of sunken tugboat. Lots of weapons and armor on the sea floor nearby. Occasional sharks.

- Package respawns every time you collect it, save the game and re-load.

**Bug:** Recently, hidden packages haven't been appearing properly. If you don't see it, quick save and re-load the game and it will be there.

**Tip**: Best way to collect packages is with the Nagasaki Dinghy, which has scuba equipment. Simply search for "Dinghy" using the search feature.

locations.title: Hidden Package #9
locations.description:
Hidden Package Briefcase $25,000 on top of an oil tank part of a sunken oil tanker loading pier, RPG on sea floor immediately south of case. Lots of weapons and armor nearby.

- Package respawns every time you collect it, save the game and re-load.

**Bug:** Recently, hidden packages haven't been appearing properly. If you don't see it, quick save and re-load the game and it will be there.

**Tip**: Best way to collect packages is with the Nagasaki Dinghy, which has scuba equipment. Simply search for "Dinghy" using the search feature.

locations.title: Hidden Package #12
locations.description:
Sunken Plane $12,000 that re-spawns. Once you get it, switch characters immediately and then switch back to the one underwater. If you do it right away you can keep getting the briefcase over and over.

**Tip:** If you're running out of air, swap to another character and back again to get a full oxygen bar.

**Bug:** Recently, hidden packages haven't been appearing properly. If you don't see it, quick save and re-load the game and it will be there.

**Tip**: Best way to collect packages is with the Nagasaki Dinghy, which has scuba equipment. Simply search for "Dinghy" using the search feature.

locations.title: Hidden Package #1
locations.description:
Four briefcases holding $25,000 each.

These Hidden Packages can only be obtained at the Altruist camp after Trevor delivers four victims. Be sure to grab them all, as this is the ONLY time these packages spawn!

locations.title: Los Santos International Airport
locations.description:
Los Santos International Airport (LSIA) is an international airport located in Los Santos, to the west of the Port of South Los Santos and to the south of La Puerta. LSIA has 3 runways, 1 on its north-western side and 2 on its southern side.
 
The airport is based off the Los Angeles International Airport. 

The airport also offers a flight school, which can be used by all 3 characters to boost their flight skills. 
 
The airport consists of three runways, two of which are used for large commercial jets while the third for smaller business jets. This is the first game in the HD universe that has planes that can take off and land on there own. It is also the first game in the HD universe that allows the player to fully control the large boeing 747 commercial jets.
 
The airport has 2 unique jumps, witch is a small runway ad that moves up to a 90 degree angle.

**Note**: A 3-star wanted level is obtained upon entering this area. This can be avoided by purchasing an aircraft hangar.

locations.description:
- Cost: $1,378,000
- Characters: Franklin, Michael
- Income: N/A

This property grants each character a single, large hangar to store purchased or stolen aircraft. When standing at the entrance of the hangar, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which aircraft to pilot.

Also, after purchasing a Rhino on the Internet, it will be saved within this hangar.

locations.title: Property: Smoke on the Water
locations.description:
- Cost: $204,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $9,300 / week

Smoke on the Water provides prescribed patients cannabis legally.

Occasionally Franklin will be called and asked for help to retrieve shipments, recover stolen shipments, or evade police.

locations.title: Property: Puerto del Sol Marina Slip
locations.description:
- Cost: $75,000
- Characters: Franklin, Michael, Trevor
- Income: N/A

This property offers each character a single marina slip to park any purchased or stolen vessels.

Note: The marina slip functions like hangars or helipads, allowing each character to stow multiple vessels. When standing near the slip, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which vessel to use.

locations.title: Property: Vespucci Helipad
locations.description:
- Cost: $419,850
- Characters: Franklin, Micheal
- Income: N/A

This property grants each character a single helipad for any purchased or stolen helicopters. When standing near the helipad, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which helicopter to use.

locations.title: Property: Tequi-La-La
locations.description:
- Cost: $2,000,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $16,500 / week

Tequi-La-La is a bar that also offers concerts.

Note: This is one of the better investments to make, as it becomes profitable relatively quickly.

locations.title: Property: Vinewood Garage
locations.description:
- Cost: $30,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: N/A

This garage allows Michael to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

locations.description:
- Cost: $10,000,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: $132,200 / week

Cinema Doppler provides the citizens of Los Santos with feature films.

Occasionally Michael will be called to defend the theater from gang attacks or protests, promote the theater by air-dropping flyers, or recovering cash after a robbery.

Note: This is a smart investment for Michael, as it turns a profit relatively quickly.

- Characters: Any
- Income: $23,000 / nuclear waste

This property allows for the purchaser to use a submarine to track down submerged nuclear waste surrounding San Andreas.

Note: There are a total of 30 nuclear waste spread across San Andreas, meaning this property becomes profitable after finding just 11. After finding all 30 nuclear waste, the net profit is $440,000.

- Income: $5,000 / ground shipment | $7,000 / air shipment

- Characters: Any
- Income: $920 / week

Occasionally the purchaser may be called to defend against various attackers, recover cash from robberies, or provide general business assistance.

locations.title: Property: Pillbox Hill Garage
locations.description:
- Cost: $30,000
- Characters: Trevor
- Income: N/A

This garage allows for Trevor to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

locations.title: Property: Grove Street Garage
locations.description:
- Cost: $30,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: N/A

This garage allows for Franklin to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

locations.title: Property: Los Santos Golf Club
locations.description:
- Cost: $150,000,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $264,500 / week

This property grants the purchaser the ability to play golf for free, and wear any clothing while golfing.

Note: This property is potentially the worst investment to make, due to the sheer amount of time it takes to turn a profit.

locations.title: Property: Tivoli Cinema
locations.description:
- Cost: $30,000,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: $142,300 / week

Tivoli Cinema provides the citizens of Los Santos with feature films.

Occasionally Michael will be called to defend the theater from gang attacks, promote the theater by air-dropping flyers, or recovering cash after a robbery.

locations.title: Property: Los Santos Customs
locations.description:
- Cost: $349,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $1,600 / week

This garage does not provide a spectacular weekly income, but it has something more rewarding than that. All car upgrades at this garage are free for Franklin after purchase.

locations.title: Gauntlet 2
locations.description:
**Prerequisite:** Choose the Subtle Approach to The Big Score.

**Gold Medal Requirements:**
- Mapped - Deliver the Gauntlet pictured in the email
- Not a Scratch - Deliver the Gauntlet with no damage
- Pimped Out - Spend $17000 modifying the Gauntlet

**Next Mission:** [Gauntlet 3](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13081)

locations.title: Taxi Mission #1
locations.description: Pick your passenger up at the entrance of the medical center. He enjoys an adrenaline rush so feel free to drive like a maniac (without crashing!).

locations.title: Taxi Mission #2
locations.description: Your second passenger is located near Up-n-Atom Burger. He's feeling a bit ill so make sure you drive carefully!

locations.title: Taxi Mission #3
locations.description: Your third passenger is waiting near the 24/7 Supermarket. He needs to get to Vinewood and he needs to get there fast. Forget about traditional routes in order to get a **Speed Bonus.**

locations.title: Taxi Mission #4
locations.description: Your fourth passenger waits outside the Ammu-Nation store. Make sure you're **armed** for this one!

locations.title: Taxi Mission #5
locations.description: Your fifth passenger is waiting in the parking lot of Galileo Park. She needs to be taken to the best tailor in town. You know which one to pick, right?

locations.title: Taxi Mission #7
locations.description: Your seventh passenger is waiting near the Flagpole. Take him to his girl on Elgin Avenue.

locations.title: Taxi Mission #8
locations.description: Your eighth passenger waits at the **Richman Hotel.** You'll need a 4-seater for this one.

locations.title: Crash Rescue
locations.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Only appears after completing the first heist. Drive the woman home quickly before she bleeds out - when you get there, she'll ask to join your crew as a getaway driver.

Benefits include her excellent driving skills and high composure, while vehicle choice is her lowest stat. Despite her skill, she only asks for a 5% cut - making her a perfect choice as a getaway driver for players wanting to save money while also having a good driver.

category.info: Complete any 14 Random Events to gain progress towards 100% completion.

locations.title: Drug Shootout
locations.description:
**Available to Trevor exclusively.**

A drug deal can be disrupted here. Inside of a shed rests a briefcase ($25k - $70k) that can be stolen. This location resets every week or two, so it may be repeated.

Note: Some people have reported that it has stopped resetting for them, or takes a considerable amount of time before finally resetting.

**Available to all characters.**

Two men attempt to bury a woman alive.

You have to kill the two men, then take the lady for a ride home. It is recommended that the woman is returned home in one piece - the reward is quite nice ($60,000).

If you're playing as Trevor, she can also be delivered to the Altruist Camp for a much smaller reward.

locations.description:

_Note: Your car will be exactly where you left it before being kidnapped._

locations.title: Hitch Lift 2
locations.description:
**Available to all characters.**

If you're playing as Trevor, you can drop her off at the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

locations.title: Hitch Lift 4
locations.description:

category.title: Random Event

locations.title: Hitch Lift 3
locations.description:

If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver her to the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

category.title: Random Event

locations.title: Snatched
locations.description:
**Available to all characters.**

A woman is being dragged into a van by two kidnappers. Shoot the tires and then kill the two men without hurting the woman. Drive her home and fight off more attackers on the way.

If you're playing as Trevor, you can take her to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

locations.title: Signal Jammer #1
locations.description: On top of the air traffic control tower. Use a helicopter or other flying vehicle to reach it.

locations.title: Signal Jammer #2
locations.description:
On top of the bridge

The Signal Jammer is located on the Northeast side of the bridge at the top of the Southeast bridge tower.

It is only viewable from the Northwest, and the best place to shoot it is from the middle of the bridge, between the towers on the Northeast side against the fence.

locations.title: Signal Jammer #3
locations.description:
On the Maze Bank logo of the arena.

The Signal Jammer is located on the Northeast side of the Arena between Maze and Bank on the building.

You can shoot it from anywhere Northeast of the Arena.

locations.title: Serial Killer Scrawlings
locations.description:
Several '8's and a sinister rhyme can be found on a large rock here.

*One is done*

_Two was fun_

_Three tried to run_

_Four called mom_

_Fives not alive_

_Six is nix_

_Seven's in heaven_

_8 won't wait_

locations.title: Jolene Cranley-Evans's Ghost
locations.description:
Travel to the marker above between 23:00 and 24:00 (11:00 PM / 12:00 Midnight) to see a ghostly image appear and a bloody message written on the Mt. Gordo peak.

The message reads “Jock” which happens to be the first name of Jock Cranley, the Vinewood Stuntman turned Conservative candidate for Governor.

YouTube Video Below (http://youtu.be/HMj8jrTgeuk)

locations.title: Serial Killer Scrawlings 2
locations.description:
From the [first rock formation](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13208), look a little left off in the distance to find another rock formation with more scrawlings.

_They want me they can have_    
_But they'll never get my people_    
_Even though I shall leave them sign enough_     
_Where they put me_

locations.title: FIB Scientists & Vehicles
locations.description:
In the PS3 & Xbox 360 versions of the game, a pair of scientists and FIB agents can be found here at around 10:00 AM in both story mode and online. Two FIB vehicles spawn next to them, either the FIB Buffalo or the FIB SUV.

Modern versions of the game have removed the agents entirely and replaced the FIB vehicles with generic counterparts - but the scientists remain, standing by a satellite roughly pointed in the direction of the spaceship above Fort Zancudo.

locations.title: Hitchhiker - Airport Ride - Tinkle stock option
locations.description:
This is where you can be lucky and find the guy who wants a ride to the airport. Make it in time and he will give you stock trading tip. Invest in Tinkle (TNK) on BAWSAQ and then later sell them once the peak starts straightening out.

*Tip:* don't pick up this guy unless you've finished the game and have the money from the last heist.

locations.title: Premium Deluxe Motorsport
locations.description:
Premium Deluxe Motorsport is a vehicle dealership located in Los Santos, San Andreas. It is owned by Simeon Yetarian.

The garage mostly sells high-cost sports cars and tuned vehicles. Franklin and Lamar are the repo men that take high end vehicles. They got fired eventually, when Lamar steals a bike (Repossession) being repossessed, and when Michael orders Franklin is caught stealing Jimmy's Karin BeeJayXL, in the mission Complications. Premium Deluxe Motorsport is located just west (on the same block) as the Ammu-Nation with range in Pillbox Hill.

locations.title: Entrance to Underground Tunnel
locations.description:
Underneath the highway.

The Entrance to the Tunnel system leading from this area, through a incomplete Tunnel, past a small clearing by the Union Depository Vault area, through a pair of Pipes and into the Los Santos Metro Tunnels, through an Incomplete station and into the Sewers which leads to the LS Sewers.

This tunnel is most notably used in the Jewel Store Job and The Big Score [Obvious] as an Escape Tunnel in the former and the way into the Union Depository Tunnel via a Tunnel Bore into the Vault in the latter.
